prompt_text:
### Demographics: 74-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 11 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after preoperative labs showed elevated HbA1c
Current symptoms: No DKA/HHS symptoms; no recent hypoglycemia episodes; no acute complaints; Nausea and reduced appetite over the last 1-2 months after starting injections.

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3a (45-59)
Body mass index category: Normal
Psychotic Disorder on Atypical Antipsychotics
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
Appendicitis (status post appendectomy)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3a (45-59); HF (No); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Normal
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (older sister)
- Social history: Never smoker; Alcohol 1-2 drinks/month

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Sitagliptin 100mg once daily; Dulaglutide 1.5mg once weekly; Quetiapine (150 mg nightly), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily), Ciprofloxacin (500 mg twice daily for 7 days)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 61.8 kg; Height 172.7 cm; BMI 20.8 kg/m²; Blood pressure 125/74 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 11.7%; 9 months ago 11.5%; 6 months ago 11.0%; 3 months ago 10.5%; current 9.7%), FPG (12 months ago 320mg/dL; 9 months ago 282mg/dL; 6 months ago 248mg/dL; 3 months ago 273mg/dL; current 215mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 65.1kg; 9 months ago 63.2kg; 6 months ago 59.1kg; 3 months ago 60.3kg; current 61.8kg), Height (12 months ago 172.7cm; 9 months ago 172.7cm; 6 months ago 172.7cm; 3 months ago 172.7cm; current 172.7cm), BMI (12 months ago 22.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 21.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 20.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 20.0kg/m²; current 20.8kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 125mmHg; 9 months ago 128mmHg; 6 months ago 124mmHg; 3 months ago 125mmHg; current 125mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 73mmHg; 9 months ago 76mmHg; 6 months ago 77mmHg; 3 months ago 73mmHg; current 74mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 26U/L; 9 months ago 25U/L; 6 months ago 18U/L; 3 months ago 18U/L; current 22U/L), AST (12 months ago 27U/L; 9 months ago 20U/L; 6 months ago 24U/L; 3 months ago 17U/L; current 23U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.6mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.6mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.6mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.7mg/dL; current 0.7mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 54mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 52mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 49mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 49mL/min/1.73m²; current 49mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 171mg/g; 9 months ago 229mg/g; 6 months ago 259mg/g; 3 months ago 279mg/g; current 230mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 98mg/dL; 9 months ago 93mg/dL; 6 months ago 91mg/dL; 3 months ago 92mg/dL; current 95mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 49mg/dL; 9 months ago 53mg/dL; 6 months ago 50mg/dL; 3 months ago 52mg/dL; current 51mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 149mg/dL; 9 months ago 127mg/dL; 6 months ago 147mg/dL; 3 months ago 128mg/dL; current 138mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 13.0g/dL; 9 months ago 12.2g/dL; 6 months ago 12.9g/dL; 3 months ago 13.0g/dL; current 12.4g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide 1.87 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
